summary: Project Detail page with 4-tab layout (Scope, Payments, Additions, Deductions) tested successfully. All backend APIs (19/19 tests passed) and frontend UI components working correctly. CRUD operations verified for all tabs. Deductions correctly reduce balance only, not project value.
seed_data_creation: Test data (scope items, payment stages, deductions) created during testing were cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Project Detail page with 4-tab layout fully functional. Backend endpoints tested: GET /projects/{id}/full-details, POST/PATCH/DELETE /scope-items, POST/PATCH/DELETE /payment-stages, POST/PATCH/DELETE /additional-costs, POST/PATCH/DELETE /deductions. Frontend tabs tested: Scope, Payments, Additions, Deductions. All CRUD operations working. Summary cards update correctly. Balance calculation verified: Total Value - Payments - Deductions.

features_tested.project_detail_page_loads: PASS - Page loads with 6 summary cards and 4 tabs
features_tested.scope_tab_add: PASS - Can add scope items with qty, unit, rate
features_tested.scope_tab_total_becomes_project_value: PASS - Scope total becomes project value
features_tested.payments_tab_add: PASS - Can add payment stages with percentage and amount
features_tested.additions_tab_add: PASS - Can add additional work items
features_tested.deductions_reduce_balance_only: PASS - Deductions reduce balance only, NOT project value
features_tested.summary_cards_update: PASS - Summary cards update correctly based on data changes
features_tested.balance_calculation: PASS - Balance = Total Value - Payments - Deductions

balance_calculation_verification.conclusion: Deductions correctly reduce balance only, not project value
